description: CompositionGrey V-neck top made of knitted, blended polyester fabric, has batwing sleeves, gathers at neckline and print on the chestFitRegularWash careRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironThe understated colouring with updated design details, fresh from sepia's design studio, makes this top the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel throw on a faded and worn denim jacket,jeans and a floral scarf. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
